name: Category Theory — Natural Transformations
description: Natural transformation η: F ⇒ G between functors: maps η_A: FA → GA for each object A, naturality square commutes. Equivalence of categories: F, G with η, ε giving isomorphisms.
mermaid:
graph TD
    D1["Def: Natural transformation\nη: F ⇒ G, η_A: FA → GA"]
    D2["Def: Naturality square\nη_B ∘ Ff = Gf ∘ η_A"]
    D3["Def: Functor category\n[C,D]"]
    D4["Def: Equivalence\nF, G with η, ε iso"]
    T1["Thm: Vertical comp\nη∘μ natural"]
    T2["Thm: Horizontal comp\nη*μ natural"]
    D1 --> D2
    D1 --> D3
    D2 --> D4
    D1 --> T1
    D1 --> T2
    classDef definition fill:#b197fc,color:#fff,stroke:#9775fa
    classDef theorem fill:#51cf66,color:#fff,stroke:#40c057
    class D1,D2,D3,D4 definition
    class T1,T2 theorem
